column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong hit probability, batting from the left side at home with the platoon advantage against Cade Cavalli. Edwards has recorded a hit in 80% of his games, offering steady reliability in a favorable park. Shea Langeliers also brings consistency near the top of Baltimore’s lineup, but faces a tougher matchup on the road. Otto Lopez and Bobby Witt Jr. are viable alternatives, though Edwards stands out for Beat The Streak builds tonight.
